hero.label: Full-Stack Web Developer
hero.bio: From 7 years in hospitality to full-stack development — I bring user empathy, attention to detail, and bilingual communication to every project.

menucraft.description: Restaurant menu management with customer-facing browser and staff CRUD portal. Mobile-first UI with real-time data fetching.

munchmatch.description: Tinder-style restaurant recommendation app with swipe interactions, custom auth, and a RESTful API.

musubiya.description: Production website for a Vancouver-based Japanese client — 結び屋. Designed and developed to brief, deployed live.

contact.bio: Open to new opportunities in Vancouver, BC. I bring a unique perspective — hospitality-trained, bilingual, and passionate about building products people love to use.
